title: Reis colored miniature
wikitext:
[]: Rei's colored miniature             Quote Post by JinKazama2006 » Wed Feb 21, 2007 7:25 am A quickly browse on that website provided in BrikHaus81's thread "2 meter tall Eva" , (could hardly read anything, but I can see pictures:) I found this by chance and a bit of luck: [url]http://ga.sbcr.jp/g-toys/happinetonline/005/index.html[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by JinKazama2006 » Wed Feb 21, 2007 7:34 am I am even more amazed when I looked at the magnified photos, the body joints are movable! Just like the toy soliders I used to play(abuse) a lot everyday when I was a child. :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by jakewashere » Wed Feb 21, 2007 2:33 pm Wonderful. Rei as a Rozen Maiden - that's just the image I need in my head.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Feb 21, 2007 2:41 pm jakewashere wrote: Delicious doll joints

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Wed Feb 21, 2007 3:06 pm 28 milimeters of win.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Feb 21, 2007 3:13 pm Needs moar post-3I bandaged Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Feb 21, 2007 3:25 pm Rei's cool and all but wheres the giant poseable Maya. Seriously..I shudder at the thought of the day when Gainax says "fuck it" and just makes the Rei Blow Up Doll. Followed closesly by the Kaworu model.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Feb 21, 2007 8:36 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Seriously..I shudder at the thought of the day when Gainax says "Whoops, we forgot to put this out!" and releases the Rei Blow Up Doll that was the first product they actually made. Followed closesly by the Kaworu model.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Feb 21, 2007 9:39 pm well at least its not peeing or eating a corn dog like all the Asuka toys...

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Wed Feb 21, 2007 9:43 pm You think you can order one of those "real dolls" and have them make it look like Rei or do you have to dye and cut the hair yourself?If i had 5K to blow then i would go for it.Hey it's better than your hand anyday.Yes i now your grossed out but i dont care.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Wed Feb 21, 2007 11:31 pm ^ TOO MUCH INFORMATION

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Thu Feb 22, 2007 9:31 pm NOT ENOUGH INFORMATION!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Feb 22, 2007 10:36 pm But does your plan involve this? " ...heavy (fan)wanking and Enzyte. Lots of Enzyte. I'll make Bob look like he only has a clitoris, and then I'll homerun both teams with MY BIG AWESOME WANG OF WANGNESS, right outta the stadium. " to quote Omegagouki? (to which BobBQ replied: You leave me out of this, or I'll be forced to use my Colt! ) :mrgreen: /stupidness
